reviews.comment:
Pésima atención. Colas de autos para carga de combustible. Parece que les molesta atender al viajero.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. Long lines of cars waiting to fill up with fuel. They seem to be bothered by the need to serve travelers.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención!! Y sus empleados muy serviciales.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service!! And their employees are very helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKcmZpbVRREAE

reviews.comment:
Pésimo, lamentable un solo playero atendiendo, sólo 2 surtidores para una gran cantidad de vehículos. Por favor!! Con lo que ganan, inviertan un poco y pongan más surtidores y empleados!!!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible! It's appalling that there's only one attendant working, and only two pumps for so many vehicles. Please! With the money you make, invest a little and add more pumps and employees!

reviews.comment:

Clean restrooms... Good service... good food and baked goods... they should add more fuel islands as it takes a long time to refuel...

reviews.comment:
PESIMA ATENCION , estuvimos más de 2 horas para cargar combustibles el día 17 - 07 -23 , a un promedio de 15 a 20 minutos por auto cargaban combustible , los playeros lo hacían a un ritmo muyyyyy relajado , mientras los usuarios esperábamos , pésimo servicio
NO LA RECOMIENDO PARA NADA A ESTA ESTACIÓN TRATE DE CARGAR ANTES O DESPUÉS DE Ojo de Agua

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. We waited over two hours to fill up on July 17, 2023. Each car was being filled every 15 to 20 minutes, and the attendants were incredibly slow while we waited. The service was awful.
I absolutely do not recommend this station. Try to fill up before or after Ojo de Agua.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKa2VtWDNnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Solo 2 playeros para cientos de autos en plenas vacaciones de invierno cuando todo el mundo sale de viaje. Super lento, pésimo servicio!

(Translated by Google)
Only two attendants for hundreds of cars during the peak of winter break when everyone is traveling. Super slow, terrible service!
